# Quant Lab Agent Docs

Start: docs/index.md

Purpose: interactive strategy research environment for retail investors. Helps users understand risk, overfitting, and regime dependence. Not a trading bot.

Primary docs:
- docs/Agent Orientation.md
- docs/Project Overview.md
- docs/Architecture.md
- docs/Local Development.md
- docs/Backend.md
- docs/Frontend.md
- docs/API Reference.md
- docs/Data Model.md
- docs/Strategy Engine.md
- docs/Testing.md
- docs/Knowledge Base.md
- docs/Agent Playbooks.md

Primary code:
- backend/main.py
- backend/quant_lab/api.py
- backend/quant_lab/domain.py
- backend/quant_lab/engine.py
- backend/quant_lab/programs.py
- backend/quant_lab/experiment_payloads.py
- backend/quant_lab/result_enrichment.py
- backend/quant_lab/robustness.py
- backend/quant_lab/wiki_exports.py
- src/App.tsx
- src/screens/LabsScreen.tsx
- src/api/experiments.ts
- src/api/types.ts

Commands:
- python -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8011
- pnpm dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173
- pytest
- pnpm.cmd build
- pnpm.cmd smoke:frontend

Rules:
- Read AGENTS.md before repo work.
- Do not modify raw/ source content unless user asks.
- Update docs/ when code behavior changes.
- Update wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md after wiki ingest or major wiki edit.
